name: ChipState
title: ChipState
description: Returns the current chip state of the CAN x controller.
return:
Chip state of the CAN x controller. See the following table for a description of the return values.
0
Value not available
1
Simulated
2
Not used
3
Error Active
4
Warning Level
5
Error Passive
6
Bus Off
A description of the chip states can also be found here: Bus Statistics Window of option CAN.
